items.speaker: narrator
items.text: Guan Yu walked into the village tavern, bound for the same war.

items.speaker: narrator
items.text: Liu Bei and Zhang Fei saw another man willing to face the chaos.

items.speaker: narrator
items.text: Three men knelt before heaven and earth. They became brothers.

items.speaker: narrator
items.text: From that day on, Liu Bei, Guan Yu, and Zhang Fei stood as one.

items.speaker: narrator
items.text: Horses, silver, and iron arrived. The brothers finally had the means to raise an army.

items.speaker: narrator
items.text: Five hundred men followed the three brothers into Youzhou. Their fate turned with the road.
